discord_message.title: PROMETHEUS V-1.1.1 — COMPETITION BUILD VERIFIED
discord_message.body: The 2:45 Command-to-Proof demonstration is live. PROMETHEUS reproduced the compound failure storm, SECA denied unsupported promotion, HYDRA changed behavior, ProofGrid verified 5/5 tests and 8/8 artifacts, Capability Genome reuse reduced failed actions from 1 to 0, and Build Truth authorized release.
discord_message.case_study_line: Ghost Atlas Institute field report GAI-FR-20260721-PROM-SF-001 documents the EDEN → Codex → PROMETHEUS → ServerForge → public-node evidence lineage.

security_boundary.note: EDEN resolves the existing private Discord connection locally. The public repository carries only the sanitized publication payload and verification references.
